data.content: Shipment complete: merged foolery-e6cd feature branch into main. The feature branch test (using vi.waitFor) was superseded by the main branch version using the local polling waitFor helper. All 9 tests pass. Lint and typecheck clean. Code already pushed to origin/main. Key commits: 125e3233 (feat: show selected agent in terminal TAKE/Claimed lines), ef2df766 (fix: replace vi.waitFor with local polling helper).
